entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: The legume crop species being studied for resistance to sterility mosaic disease.

entities.name: STERILITY MOSAIC DISEASE
entities.description: A serious production constraint in pigeonpea that can lead to complete yield loss.

entities.name: SMD RESISTANCE
entities.description: The phenotypic trait of being resistant to sterility mosaic disease in pigeonpea.

entities.name: GENOTYPING-BY-SEQUENCING
entities.description: A genomic approach used for the simultaneous identification and genotyping of single nucleotide polymorphisms.

entities.name: SNPS
entities.description: Single Nucleotide Polymorphisms used as markers for genetic mapping.

entities.name: MAPPING POPULATIONS
entities.description: Sets of individuals, including recombinant inbred lines and F2, used to link phenotypes to genotypes.

entities.name: RECOMBINANT INBRED LINES
entities.description: A specific type of mapping population consisting of homozygous lines.

entities.name: PHENOTYPING
entities.description: The process of evaluating the physical expression of SMD resistance across different locations and years.

entities.name: GENETIC MAPS
entities.description: Representations of the relative positions of SNPs on chromosomes.

entities.name: COMPOSITE INTERVAL MAPPING
entities.description: A method used for the precise identification of QTLs.

entities.name: QTL ANALYSIS
entities.description: The analytical process used to identify quantitative trait loci associated with a trait.

entities.name: QTLS
entities.description: Quantitative Trait Loci that contribute to the variance of a trait.

entities.name: CCLG11
entities.description: A specific linkage group in pigeonpea containing a promising QTL for SMD resistance.

entities.name: MOLECULAR BREEDING
entities.description: The application of genomic information to develop superior crop lines with enhanced traits.
